type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in fugitive releases are due to major construction of the front entrance of the Site in 2008 versus minimal construction in 2007. Adjustment made to the point release in 2008 as per updated emission factors provided by USEPA July 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in fugitive releases are due to less construction activity at the Site in 2007 versus 2006.  The increase in point releases are due to the addition of propane heating at the Site.  Note the flare ran a third of the time in 2007 versus 2006.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in fugitive releases is due to lower levels of construction activity at the site than in 2005.  The decrease in point release is due to increased sale of methane off-site resulting in decreased operation of the flare to burn excess methane.
